title: PARA Knowledge Item
description: Validates metadata.json for Knowledge Items in ~/.gemini/antigravity/knowledge/. Graph-ready fields (relates_to, code_refs, concepts) enable future Knowledge Graph without runtime dependencies.

title.description: Descriptive title for the Knowledge Item.

summary.description: Concise summary of what this KI covers. Injected by Antigravity at session start.

scope.description: Visibility scope: workspace (all projects), project (single), ecosystem (multi-project).

domain.description: Knowledge domain (open enum). Aligns with future Department System (v1.8.0). Examples: workspace, engineering, content, strategy, operations.

purpose.description: How this KI is used. context=priming, playbook=procedures, reference=lookup, pitfall=gotchas.

owner.description: para = system-managed (slug starts with para_), user = agent-created.

para_version.description: PARA Workspace version at KI creation/update time. Required for owner:para, null for owner:user.

value.description: Reference value: absolute file path, conversation UUID, or URL.

relates_to.description: Graph-ready: KI-to-KI edges. Optional. Enables future Knowledge Graph traversal.

items.description: Relative path from workspace root to a relevant code file or directory.

code_refs.description: Graph-ready: KI-to-Code edges. Optional. Links KI knowledge to actual implementation files.

concepts.description: Graph-ready: Concept nodes. Optional. Shared concepts across KIs enable semantic clustering.
